notableEvents.label: Alex Call pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Alex Call strikes out on a foul tip.

notableEvents.label: Miguel Rojas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Miguel Rojas homers (2) on a fly ball to left center field.

notableEvents.label: Cedric Mullins GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Cedric Mullins grounds into a double play, shortstop Mookie Betts to first baseman Freddie Freeman. Austin Slater out at 2nd. Cedric Mullins out at 1st.
